---
title: "Overview"
---


## Course Overview
* Course site (you are here)
* [Syllabus](index.qmd)
* [Assignments](requirements.qmd)
* [Schedule](schedule.md)

## Why study the neuroscience of language?

| Slides | Background reading | Primary literature | 
| -- | -- | -- |
| [<span class="blue-badge">Overview ↗</span>](https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1S-twq_R9KZWHKwUxCgpskvh7g66OaMdo1Z-OYOKt820/edit?slide=id.g3d423b79775_0_0#slide=id.g3d423b79775_0_0) | SGN Ch. 1: *Introduction*  | None |

::: {.callout-tip appearance=simple}
# Learning Goals
1. Identify one reason to study language
1. Identify one reason to study the brain
1. Recognize that there are multiple levels at which one can understand a cognitive system, and understand the differences

:::
